channel.title: TECNO Mobile Limited — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by TECNO Mobile Limited (tecnomobile).

item.title: CVE-2026-0634 · 7.8 HIGH — Code Execution in AssistFeedbackService on TECNO Pova7 Pro 5G
item.description: Code execution in AssistFeedbackService of TECNO Pova7 Pro 5G on Android allows local apps to execute arbitrary code as system via command injection.

item.title: CVE-2025-15385 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity vulnerability in TECNO Mobile com.Afmobi.Boomplayer allows Authentication Bypass.This issue affects com.Afmobi.Boomplayer: 7.4.63.

item.title: CVE-2025-14817 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Factory Mode App Exists Privilege Escalation Issue Allowing Third-Party Apps to Open ADB
item.description: The component com.transsion.tranfacmode.entrance.main.MainActivity in com.transsion.tranfacmode has no permission control and can be accessed by third-party apps which can construct intents to directly open adb debugging functionality without user in…

item.title: CVE-2025-9056 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Unprotected service in the AudioLink component allows a local attacker to overwrite system files via unauthorized service invocation.

item.title: CVE-2025-7703 · 3.1 LOW
item.description: Authentication vulnerability in the mobile application（tech.palm.id）may lead to the risk of information leakage.

item.title: CVE-2025-6172 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Permission vulnerability in the mobile application (com.afmobi.boomplayer) may lead to the risk of unauthorized operation.

item.title: CVE-2025-4737 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Insufficient encryption vulnerability in the mobile application (com.transsion.aivoiceassistant) may lead to the risk of sensitive information leakage.

item.title: CVE-2025-3698 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Interface exposure vulnerability in the mobile application (com.transsion.carlcare) may lead to information leakage risk.

item.title: CVE-2025-2190 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: The mobile application (com.transsnet.store) has a man-in-the-middle attack vulnerability, which may lead to code injection risks.

item.title: CVE-2025-1298 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Logic vulnerability in the mobile application (com.transsion.carlcare) may lead to the risk of account takeover.

item.title: CVE-2025-0590 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Improper permission settings for mobile applications (com.transsion.carlcare) may lead to information leakage risk.

item.title: CVE-2024-12603 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: A logic vulnerability in the the mobile application (com.transsion.applock) can lead to bypassing the application password.

item.title: CVE-2024-11206 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Unauthorized access vulnerability in the mobile application (com.transsion.phoenix) can lead to the leakage of user information.

item.title: CVE-2024-10018 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Improper permission control in the mobile application (com.transsion.aivoiceassistant) can lead to the launch of any unexported component.

item.title: CVE-2024-8039 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Improper permission configurationDomain configuration vulnerability of the mobile application (com.afmobi.boomplayer) can lead to account takeover risks.

item.title: CVE-2024-7697 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Logical vulnerability in com.transsion.carlcare
item.description: Logical vulnerability in the mobile application (com.transsion.carlcare) may lead to user information leakage risks.

item.title: CVE-2024-6780 · 3.3 LOW — Improper permission control in com.android.server.telecom
item.description: Improper permission control in the mobile application (com.android.server.telecom) may lead to user information security risks.

item.title: CVE-2024-5163 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Improper permission settings in com.transsion.carlcare
item.description: Improper permission settings for mobile applications (com.transsion.carlcare) may lead to user password and account security risks.

item.title: CVE-2024-4988 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper permission control in com.transsion.videocallenhancer
item.description: The mobile application (com.transsion.videocallenhancer) interface has improper permission control, which can lead to the risk of private file leakage.

item.title: CVE-2024-3701 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Improper Authentication in com.transsion.kolun.aiservice
item.description: The system application (com.transsion.kolun.aiservice) component does not perform an authentication check, which allows attackers to perform malicious exploitations and affect system services.
